channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Golden Insights: High-Quality Products Derived from Commercial Earth Observations
item.description: Golden Insights can provide information advantage from commercial remote sensing; but how does anyone know which products will best meet their needs? This report educates both producers and consumers to improve market transparency and the value of geospatial analytics.
